_comment: workflows_list.example.json — synthetic placeholder for the gitignored workflows_list.json. Copy to workflows_list.json and fill in real values from the n8n cloud instance via `bun scripts/list-workflows.ts`. The real file is gitignored and never committed (it had verified live keys in past dumps).
_shape: Array of n8n workflow summaries as returned by GET /rest/workflows. Each entry shows the structure a reviewer would see post-clone after running the listing script against a fresh n8n instance.
